title: Virtual Winding Temperature Sensing
description: Estimate the temperature of an electric motor windings using a regression model
long_description: This project allows you to develop a regression model capable of estimating the temperature of the windings of an electric motor using the measured die temperature, direct and quadrature currents and motor speed (rpm). The model is suitable for real-time, low powered embedded applications like thermal management and motor control in automotive systems as well as in power tools and appliances.
